offer: For medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, unresolved patient billing disputes cause cash flow gaps. We monitor disputes and flag unresolved cases instead of manual tracking of billing disputes.
problem: Unresolved patient billing disputes leading to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing support
Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to clinics with a demo video
Engage in community forums for medical tools
try_it: Let users manually track disputes on 1-3 cases
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the process
Provide early access for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for data entry
